meta.title: Technical Lead | Decentralized Systems Builder
meta.description: Technical Lead and decentralized systems builder at the intersection of permanent storage, autonomous compute, and ecosystem infrastructure. Arweave & AO.
meta.name: JHarmony
meta.subtitle: Technical Lead · Decentralized Systems Builder

about.bio:
Technical Lead and decentralized systems builder operating at the intersection of permanent storage, autonomous compute, and ecosystem infrastructure.

Over the past several years I've worked within the Arweave and AO ecosystems under Forward Research, evolving from community leadership into full product and engineering ownership. I led end-to-end development of BazAR, a decentralized atomic asset marketplace built on Arweave and AO.

My work spans far beyond code: I've designed and deployed permanent campaign infrastructure on Arweave, integrated AI-driven development workflows (OpenAI, Claude, Llama, OpenRouter), architected marketplace trading systems (micro-orderbooks), and coordinated global ecosystem activations across the United States, Latin America, Africa, the Middle East, and Asia.

I managed Permabites IRL, a multi-continent initiative bringing decentralized infrastructure education into real-world communities. I care about permanence, ownership, and building infrastructure that outlasts trends.
highlights: AO process architecture & message-based state management
initiatives: Weavers Raid II, III, and IV

experience.description: Led end-to-end engineering and product development for BazAR, a decentralized atomic asset marketplace built on Arweave and AO infrastructure. Owned system architecture, backend and frontend development, repository management, and production stability during rapid protocol evolution (AO mainnet, HyperBEAM, UCM). Designed and implemented marketplace trading systems, micro-orderbooks, asset minting tools, profile infrastructure, and ecosystem integrations. Maintained multiple production codebases while coordinating product roadmap, developer experience, and creator onboarding. Directed platform marketing strategy, social media growth, and global community initiatives including Permabites IRL events. Acted as primary technical owner and cross-functional lead, interfacing directly with protocol teams and ecosystem partners.

Led end-to-end engineering and product development for BazAR. Integrated AI-assisted workflows (LLMs including OpenAI, Claude, Llama) into product development, automation, and content operations. Primary technical owner and cross-functional lead with protocol teams and ecosystem partners.

Managed the official AO community Discord, overseeing moderation, engagement strategy, onboarding workflows, and technical support channels. Coordinated cross-functional communication between protocol teams, developers, and community members. Elevated by CEO to assume leadership of BazAR product and engineering operations.

projects.title: BazAR
projects.subtitle: Atomic Asset Marketplace on Arweave
projects.description: Decentralized atomic asset marketplace built on Arweave and AO. Trading systems, micro-orderbooks, UDL integration. Fully decentralized token exchange for AO tokens via HyperBEAM.

projects.title: PermaHub
projects.subtitle: Permanent Campaign & Ecosystem Hub
projects.description: Permanent campaign and ecosystem hub on the Arweave network, aggregating Permabites, StarGrid, and community-driven activations. Infrastructure for long-term campaign pages, documentation, and ecosystem resources with verifiable permanence.

projects.title: PermaTell
projects.subtitle: Stories on the Permaweb
projects.description: Stories live permanently on the Arweave blockchain with Permatell leveraging AO processes. Book summaries and reflections preserved forever on the permaweb.

projects.title: Permabites IRL – Global Ecosystem Activation
projects.subtitle: Multi-Continent Decentralized Education
projects.description: Led Permabites IRL, a global grassroots initiative sponsored by BazAR bringing decentralized infrastructure education into real-world communities. Permanent landing pages on Arweave for each activation. International hosts across the US, Nigeria, Saudi Arabia, China, India, and beyond. Educational tracks from wallet onboarding to AO architecture, UDL, and decentralized compute. Scaled from 3 pilot events to a multi-continent campaign.

projects.title: Agents of the Permaweb – AI Hackathon
projects.subtitle: Global Hackathon on AO
projects.description: Contributed to Agents of the Permaweb, a global hackathon for building autonomous AI agents on AO. Designed and deployed the official permanent landing page on Arweave. $39,000 prize pool, builder resources, and long-term campaign permanence.

projects.title: Berlin Fragments (with AO Team)
projects.subtitle: Decentralized Ecosystem Activation
projects.description: Collaborated with the AO core team on Berlin Fragments. Built and deployed permanent campaign website on Arweave. Street-level marketing campaign across Berlin with physical posters and grassroots outreach.

projects.title: Permabrawl
projects.subtitle: Community-Driven Atomic Assets Campaign
projects.description: Designed and launched Permabrawl, minting and trading atomic assets on AO. Permanent campaign website on Arweave with asset discovery, trading logic, and participation tracking.

projects.title: PermaHacks 2024 – Innovation Unleashed
projects.subtitle: 10-Day Global Hackathon
projects.description: Contributed to PermaHacks 2024, a 10-day global hackathon for dApps on Arweave and AO. Developer onboarding, technical mentorship, project evaluation. Categories: decentralized payments, social apps, tokenized assets, decentralized identity.

projects.title: Weavers Hackathon – Startup World Cup Bogotá
projects.subtitle: Latin America Ecosystem Expansion
projects.description: Co-organized and executed the Weavers Hackathon at Startup World Cup Bogotá, expanding Arweave and AO presence into Latin America. Campaign promotion, video communications, technical guidance for participants.

projects.title: The Weavers Hall of Fame 2024 – Arweave Day
projects.subtitle: Arweave Day Initiative
projects.description: Contributed to The Weavers Hall of Fame 2024 during Arweave Day. Curated production-ready dApps: decentralized video streaming, AI virtual worlds, gaming protocols, social dApps, Web wallets, browser compute. Highlighted Permaverse, Streamint, Typr, WebCU.

projects.title: Permaweb-libs (AO/Arweave SDK)
projects.subtitle: Ecosystem SDK
projects.description: Contributed to Permaweb-libs, the AO/Arweave SDK. Repository management and ecosystem tooling.
